chess.name: Lichess standard rated games
chess.license: database.lichess.org terms / CC0-style public database notice
chess.notes: Use standard rated games; filter by rating/time control if a stricter top-play subset is required.

shogi.name: AobaZero self-play CSA archives
shogi.license: verify upstream redistribution terms before mirroring raw records
shogi.notes: Primary move-only source. Public reports cite tens of millions of CSA records.

shogi.name: Floodgate yearly archives
shogi.license: public floodgate archive; preserve provenance and checksums

go.name: OGS public SGF collection
go.license: research/AI training stated by corpus maintainer; verify before redistribution
go.notes: Large public Go corpus; apply rank filters for stronger-play subsets.

othello.name: tdooms/othello
othello.license: verify Hugging Face dataset card before redistribution

othello.name: MetaOthello
othello.license: verify Hugging Face dataset card before redistribution

poker.name: PHH dataset
poker.license: MIT for GitHub subset; verify Zenodo full corpus license
poker.notes: Use public actions only; do not leak private hole cards before decisions.

bridge.name: Vugraph Project / ComputerBridge PBN finals
bridge.license: verify event and archive redistribution terms before mirroring raw records
bridge.notes: World Championship, NABC, Bermuda Bowl, Venice Cup, Vanderbilt and other high-level PBN files. Highest-quality seed, but unlikely to reach 3B tokens alone.

bridge.name: BBO/Vugraph public archives
bridge.license: verify BBO/Vugraph terms before bulk redistribution
bridge.notes: Largest practical source of expert and public tournament bridge records; convert LIN to PBN before ingestion. Use event filters for top-level play.
